info.title: Easy Intake partner webhook (public overview)
info.description:
Public overview of the intake webhook used by integrated partners (e.g. lead portals). Authentication uses a shared secret header agreed during onboarding. This document summarizes the public surface only; full field-level contracts are maintained with integration partners.

Web application (dashboard): https://app.easyintakeapp.com/
Intake API (this webhook): https://api.easyintakeapp.com/
Marketing site: https://easyintakeapp.com

servers.description: Intake engine API host (webhooks and partner integrations)

post.description: Receives JSON events (for example lead capture and prequalification updates) for intake processing and CRM workflows including GoHighLevel.

parameters.name: X-Webhook-Secret
parameters.description: Shared secret provisioned for the partner integration (rotated out of band).

parameters.name: X-GHL-Location-Id
parameters.description: Optional GoHighLevel sub-account id when multiple agency locations share one API configuration.

data.description: Event payload including lead identifiers and funnel data.
